problem: What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost?
mechanism: Carbon nanotube alignment in polymer matrix
hypothesis: What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Carbon. Carbon nanotube alignment in polymer matrix directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 5 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
